steps.title: Translate the percentage statements into equations
steps.content:
The mass of object A is 441% of the mass of object B:
$$A = 4.41B$$
The mass of object A is 0.630% of the mass of object C:
$$A = 0.00630C$$

steps.title: Equate the two expressions for A and solve for the ratio C/B
steps.content:
Set the two expressions for A equal:
$$4.41B = 0.00630C$$
Divide both sides by B and then by 0.00630:
$$\frac{C}{B} = \frac{4.41}{0.00630} = 700$$

steps.title: Express C as a percent of B and compute p
steps.content:
By definition, C is p% of B:
$$C = \frac{p}{100}B$$
Thus $$\frac{p}{100} = \frac{C}{B} = 700$$
Multiply both sides by 100:
$$p = 700 \times 100 = 70000$$
The answer is 70000.
